Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IAutoUpdatePlatformProvider

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Platform-specific provider for auto-update operations. Implement this interface to supply update mechanics for each target platform.

public interface IAutoUpdatePlatformProvider

Methods

ApplyUpdateAsync(string, CancellationToken)

Applies the downloaded update and restarts the application. This method may not return if a restart is triggered.

Task ApplyUpdateAsync(string packagePath, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

packagePath string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task

CheckForUpdateAsync(AutoUpdateOptions, string, CancellationToken)

Fetches update metadata from the feed URL. Returns null if the current version is already the latest.

Task<UpdateInfo?> CheckForUpdateAsync(AutoUpdateOptions options, string currentVersion, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

options AutoUpdateOptions
currentVersion string
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<UpdateInfo>

DownloadUpdateAsync(UpdateInfo, AutoUpdateOptions, Action<UpdateDownloadProgress>?, CancellationToken)

Downloads the update package to a staging location.

Task<string> DownloadUpdateAsync(UpdateInfo update, AutoUpdateOptions options, Action<UpdateDownloadProgress>? onProgress = null, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

update UpdateInfo

The update to download.

options AutoUpdateOptions

Update configuration.

onProgress Action<UpdateDownloadProgress>

Progress callback invoked during download.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token.

Returns

Task<string>

Path to the downloaded package file.

GetCurrentVersion()

Returns the currently running application version string.

string GetCurrentVersion()

Returns

string

VerifyPackageAsync(string, UpdateInfo, CancellationToken)

Verifies the integrity of a downloaded update package. Returns true if the package is valid.

Task<bool> VerifyPackageAsync(string packagePath, UpdateInfo update, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

packagePath string
update UpdateInfo
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<bool>
